2395320.name: Windy Waltz
2395320.description:
About This Game

Since ancient times, the sky has been the realm of God.
Humans began to treat God's things recklessly, so God's anger got worse and worse

A person who relieves God's anger has appeared
The person is called "Sindosi".

I lost my mother in a typhoon when I was young.
As usual, I was on my way to the convenience store

[Disaster warning text] A very strong typhoon occurred.

"Hey, where did the typhoon just come from?!"
A girl asks like that and starts running to the center of the typhoon.

"It's dangerous over there!"
I was following the girl without realizing it.

Controls

The controls are very simple.
Moving on to the next chapter is either a space key or a left-click, and game termination and settings are available by pressing the ESC key.

Requirements

'Windy Waltz' can work on any Windows computer with working 3D graphics is sufficient. Also, it can be run on Windows 7/8/10. but not tested in Steam OS & Mac & Linux yet.
